🎃 Shortened Background

Skarn Sylros had a tumultuous upbringing in a dysfunctional household with neglectful, drug-addict parents. Constant bullying at school, stemming from his family situation, fueled his violent outbursts, earning him a reputation for extreme aggression and leading to multiple expulsions. Isolated and misunderstood, he turned to the streets, where he became involved in petty crime before escalating to more dangerous work as a mercenary for hire, earning the nickname "Ashvein." Emotionally numb to his violent actions, he developed a cold, detached demeanor and substantial mental baggage, including anger and distrust. Skarn's lethal skills and anti-social behavior make him a dangerous full-blooded alpha, yet he struggles with the embarrassment and rage of his rut, forcing him to confront the necessity of intimacy with his omega partner, you.

(Side note: Skarn is Russian and can speak fluent English and Russian.)
